description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a simple, modern design, featuring a flat, smooth tabletop and four straight legs positioned at each corner. The tabletop has a natural wood grain finish, giving it a warm and inviting appearance suitable for communal or work settings. The legs are sturdy and appear to be made of the same wood as the top, providing reliable support and stability. There are no visible drawers, shelves, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The table's proportions suggest it could comfortably seat four to six people, making it ideal for use in parks, public plazas, or outdoor cafes. Its robust construction and neutral color palette allow it to blend seamlessly into various urban environments.
description: A rectangular wooden table with a smooth, natural wood grain finish and four straight legs, designed for communal or work use. Its minimalist style and sturdy build make it suitable for urban outdoor or indoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and all four legs, highlighting the table's rectangular shape and sturdy construction.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow edge of the tabletop and two legs, emphasizing the table's thickness and leg placement.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the full tabletop and all four legs from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the narrow tabletop edge and two legs visible.
